seo.metaTitle: Vanaila HRIS | Performance Management Software for Indonesian Teams
seo.metaDescription: Manage appraisals, KPI reviews, probation workflows, PIP tracking, and HR document generation in one role-aware HRIS platform.

sections.heading: Stop Managing Performance.|Start Developing People.
sections.body: One platform to run your entire performance lifecycle, from probation to appraisals, KPIs to improvement plans, built for Indonesian organisations that are serious about growing their people.
sections.mediaAlt: Vanaila HRIS employee and role management workspace

sections.heading: Sound familiar?
sections.body: There's a better way to run performance management, and it does not require a 6-month implementation.

sections.heading: HR still chases managers for appraisal forms via WhatsApp
sections.body: Manual follow-ups delay reviews and make accountability impossible to track.

sections.heading: KPI targets live in spreadsheets no one updates
sections.body: Performance targets drift because the system of record is fragmented from the people expected to use it.

sections.heading: Probation deadlines slip through the cracks
sections.body: Teams discover critical milestones too late, after extension letters and review notes should already be ready.

sections.heading: Performance data is scattered and hard to report
sections.body: Directors need clear signals, but HR spends review season stitching numbers together by hand.

sections.heading: Nobody knows who's due for a review this month
sections.body: The lack of visibility creates surprises, inconsistent follow-through, and unnecessary compliance risk.

sections.heading: Meet Vanaila HRIS,|performance built in, not bolted on
sections.body: Vanaila is a browser-based HR suite designed for the full employee performance lifecycle. No desktop installs. No complex setup. Role-aware from day one, so managers see their teams, HR sees everything, and employees only see what is theirs.

sections.heading: Everything your HR team needs to run a fair, consistent, and documented appraisal process
sections.body: One system to define standards, run reviews, generate documents, and report with confidence.

sections.heading: Competency assessments
sections.body: Define the competency frameworks that matter for your organisation. Score employees consistently against configurable criteria, not guesswork, not gut feeling. Every assessment is recorded, traceable, and reportable.

sections.heading: KPI governance
sections.body: Set targets. Track progress. Run approvals. KPI definitions flow from HR down to managers and employees with a built-in workflow, so everyone knows what is expected and results are documented when review season arrives.
sections.mediaAlt: Vanaila HRIS division KPI governance view

sections.heading: Probation and PIP workflows
sections.body: Never miss a probation deadline again. Vanaila tracks every new hire probation period, flags upcoming milestones, and keeps a full audit trail of performance improvement plans.
sections.mediaAlt: Vanaila HRIS probation and PIP workflow screen

sections.heading: HR documents generated in seconds
sections.body: From warning letters to employment contracts, generate legally formatted HR documents directly from the platform. Templates are editable, signer-ready, and export as clean A4 PDFs.

sections.heading: Dashboard and reporting
sections.body: Aggregated performance views for directors and HR leadership. Export KPI and probation reports without digging through spreadsheets. Real data, on demand.
sections.mediaAlt: Vanaila HRIS KPI records and reporting dashboard

sections.heading: Role-aware access, always
sections.body: Employees. Managers. HR. Directors. Every user sees exactly what they should, nothing more, nothing less. Built-in role separation means no accidental data exposure and no permission headaches.
sections.mediaAlt: Vanaila HRIS employee access and role separation view

sections.heading: Built for how Indonesian HR teams actually work
sections.body: We did not build a generic HRIS and translate it. Vanaila was designed with Indonesian HR workflows in mind, including Bahasa Indonesia document templates, local probation and PIP practices, and the audit documentation your disnaker compliance process actually requires.

sections.heading: Up and running without an IT project
sections.body: Launch in clear operational steps instead of a heavyweight implementation cycle.

sections.heading: Set up your organisation
sections.body: Add employees, assign roles, and configure your competency and KPI frameworks so every review starts from the same baseline.

sections.heading: Run your cycles
sections.body: Track probation, mid-year and annual appraisals, KPI reviews, and PIP monitoring in one role-aware workflow.

sections.heading: Generate and export
sections.body: Produce official HR documents, export reports, and keep a full history of every decision when leadership or compliance asks for it.

sections.heading: Performance management should not cost a fortune|to implement
sections.body: Vanaila is priced for growing Indonesian companies, not enterprise multinationals. No per-module licensing. No surprise implementation fees.

sections.heading: Your next appraisal cycle|does not have to be a fire drill
sections.body: Give your HR team the structure, the tools, and the records they need to run performance management with confidence.

blogPosts.title: How to Structure a High-Converting Service Landing Page
blogPosts.excerpt: A practical structure for hero sections, proof blocks, and conversion paths that increase lead quality.
blogPosts.content:
# Why structure matters

High-converting pages are clear, specific, and fast.

## Recommended flow

1. Hero with clear value proposition
2. Social proof
3. Service detail with outcomes
4. CTA with low friction

Keep sections simple and measurable.
blogPosts.author: Editorial Team

seo.metaTitle: How to Structure a High-Converting Service Landing Page
seo.metaDescription: Use this framework to build service pages that improve conversion and organic visibility.

Use statuses, approvals, and clear owners.

Draft quickly, review carefully, then publish with SEO checks.

portfolioProjects.title: Assessment App
portfolioProjects.summary: Custom web application built for psychologists to collect structured socio-cultural research data. The product was later discontinued in 2022 after the research cycle ended.
portfolioProjects.challenge: The research team needed a secure and easy way to distribute assessments, capture participant responses, and reduce manual spreadsheet handling during the data-collection phase.
portfolioProjects.solution: We designed a custom web app with guided participant flows, form-based intake screens, and a lightweight admin workflow that made field data collection easier for non-technical researchers.
portfolioProjects.outcome: The team gained a cleaner collection workflow for research operations. The platform is now inactive because the program concluded in 2022, but it remains a strong example of a purpose-built internal application.

seo.metaTitle: Assessment App Case Study | Research Data Collection Web App
seo.metaDescription: Case study of a custom assessment web app built to help psychologists collect structured research data more efficiently.

portfolioProjects.title: Biliamind
portfolioProjects.summary: Learning management website designed to publish mentor-led courses, course listings, and educational landing pages in a clean commercial format.
portfolioProjects.challenge: The brand needed a structured web presence that could present courses clearly, support conversion-oriented messaging, and make the learning offer easier to browse.
portfolioProjects.solution: We built a polished LMS-style website layout with content hierarchy for courses, mentors, and learning benefits, keeping the interface approachable for first-time visitors.
portfolioProjects.outcome: Biliamind gained a clearer online storefront for digital learning offers and a stronger foundation for content-driven growth.

seo.metaTitle: Biliamind Case Study | LMS Website Development
seo.metaDescription: LMS website case study for Biliamind, focused on course presentation, educational content structure, and lead generation.

portfolioProjects.title: Greenretech
portfolioProjects.summary: WooCommerce website created to sell wood pellet products to international buyers with a cleaner product showcase and export-oriented positioning.
portfolioProjects.challenge: The business needed a professional ecommerce presence that could communicate product credibility, showcase catalog information, and support international buying interest.
portfolioProjects.solution: We built a WooCommerce-based storefront with product sections, trust messaging, and a global-friendly presentation tailored to industrial export customers.
portfolioProjects.outcome: Greenretech gained a more credible ecommerce channel for premium wood pellet sales and a stronger digital presentation for international inquiries.

seo.metaTitle: Greenretech Case Study | WooCommerce Export Website
seo.metaDescription: WooCommerce case study for Greenretech, built to sell wood pellet products for international customers with a professional ecommerce experience.

portfolioProjects.title: HR Performance
portfolioProjects.summary: Custom HR performance suite for KPI management, analytics dashboards, employee performance tracking, and training need analysis.
portfolioProjects.challenge: The organization needed a centralized internal system to manage KPI measurement, reporting visibility, and competency tracking across teams.
portfolioProjects.solution: We developed a custom web application with performance dashboards, KPI management modules, records, and role-based operational views for HR workflows.
portfolioProjects.outcome: HR teams received a dedicated internal platform to monitor performance and training priorities with clearer reporting and operational consistency.

seo.metaTitle: HR Performance Case Study | KPI and HR Analytics System
seo.metaDescription: Custom HR system case study covering KPI management, analytics dashboards, employee performance monitoring, and training need analysis.

portfolioProjects.title: Langgeng Sejahtera
portfolioProjects.summary: Company profile website for a furniture manufacturing business, designed to present operations, capabilities, and brand credibility online.
portfolioProjects.challenge: The company needed a more professional digital presence to explain its manufacturing background and support trust with prospective business partners.
portfolioProjects.solution: We produced a structured company profile website with a stronger visual hierarchy, corporate storytelling, and clear access points for business inquiries.
portfolioProjects.outcome: Langgeng Sejahtera gained a more polished company profile site that better communicates its manufacturing identity and business positioning.

seo.metaTitle: Langgeng Sejahtera Case Study | Company Profile Website
seo.metaDescription: Company profile website case study for Langgeng Sejahtera, focused on corporate credibility, business storytelling, and lead-ready presentation.

portfolioProjects.title: Maza Adventure
portfolioProjects.summary: Company profile website for an event and tour organizer, featuring outdoor programs, travel packages, and a more energetic visual direction.
portfolioProjects.challenge: The brand needed a modern web presence that could showcase experiences, build trust quickly, and make the core programs easier to understand online.
portfolioProjects.solution: We built a tourism-focused company profile website with hero storytelling, program highlights, and clearer pathways for potential customers to explore activities.
portfolioProjects.outcome: Maza Adventure gained a stronger promotional website that presents its event and tour services with more confidence and clearer conversion paths.

seo.metaTitle: Maza Adventure Case Study | Tour Organizer Website
seo.metaDescription: Website case study for Maza Adventure, built to present event and tour programs with clearer storytelling and conversion-focused structure.

portfolioProjects.title: Rumah Psikologi
portfolioProjects.summary: Company profile website for a psychology practice, designed to communicate services, consultation pathways, and a calm approachable brand identity.
portfolioProjects.challenge: The practice needed a friendlier and more trustworthy website to introduce its services and help visitors understand how to start a consultation.
portfolioProjects.solution: We created a soft visual system and a structured company profile website that highlights the practice, service offerings, and primary consultation actions.
portfolioProjects.outcome: Rumah Psikologi gained a clearer digital front door for prospective clients and a more approachable service presentation.

seo.metaTitle: Rumah Psikologi Case Study | Psychology Practice Website
seo.metaDescription: Psychology company profile website case study focused on service clarity, trust-building, and consultation readiness.
